name: Fantastica
description:
A realm where every wish can come true.

•Fantasy•

You have dreamed about this since childhood—being transported to a place where anything is possible. A world where you can become whoever or whatever you want to be, and bend reality itself.

It was merely a silly fantasy.

But this morning, when you opened your eyes, you found yourself surrounded by a cloud of glowing mist, under unfamiliar skies, greeted by a being you believed could only exist in myths. Your new companion.

They say, be careful what you wish for.

•Tags• Open world, original, OC, sandbox, adventure, super powers, another realm, dream, fantasy, immortal being, GOC character
creator: DreamForge
